d: Thador slams the ground with his shield, dealing [[320%]]<ATK> damage to enemies within 2 tiles and conjuring a ritual zone for the Moonveil Rite. The ritual zone lasts for [[12]]s and reduces the Crit DMG DEF of enemies within by [[40]]. When enemies have accumulated damage totaling [[1500%]] of Thador's initial ATK while inside the zone, he unleashes a shadow eruption, dealing [[160%]] of [[Team ATK]] damage to each enemy inside the zone. Each ally is then healed for [[80%]] of the eruption's total damage dealt. The eruption can trigger once per Moonveil Rite.
Increases damage dealt by the eruption to [[170%]] of the [[Team ATK]].
Increases damage dealt by the eruption to [[180%]] of the [[Team ATK]].
Increases damage dealt by the eruption to [[190%]] of the [[Team ATK]].
Increases damage dealt by the eruption to [[200%]] of the [[Team ATK]].

Passive. During battle preparation, Thador designates the ally placed 1 tile behind him as his lieutenant. While Thador remains alive, his lieutenant gains [[15]] Crit.
Active. Thador grants both himself and his lieutenant a shield that absorbs [[350%]]<ATK> damage for [[8]]s.
Increases the shield value granted by this skill to [[360%]]<ATK>.
Increases the shield value granted by this skill to [[370%]]<ATK>.
Increases the shield value granted by this skill to [[380%]]<ATK>.
Thador swings his curved blade in a [[2]]-tile crescent arc, dealing [[310%]]<ATK> damage to enemies in front of him and knocking them down for [[1.5]]s.
Increases damage to [[320%]]<ATK>.
Increases damage to [[330%]]<ATK>.
Increases damage to [[340%]]<ATK>.
Reduces damage taken by [[12%]] during battle.
Reduces damage taken by [[16%]] during battle.
Reduces damage taken by [[20%]] during battle.

When Thador's lieutenant casts Ultimate for the first time, Thador summons the Darkmoon over the battlefield. While active, the Darkmoon deals [[80%]]<ATK> damage to each enemy every [[0.5]]s and reduces their Phys & Magic DEF by [[55%]]. After [[6]]s, the Darkmoon fades, dealing [[520%]]<ATK> damage to each enemy. This effect can trigger once per battle.
Increases damage when the effect ends to [[540%]]<ATK>.
Grants Thador's lieutenant [[350]] Energy when a battle starts.
Increases damage when the effect ends to [[560%]]<ATK>.

r.d: In Rivalry Mode, when HP drops below [[60%]], reduces damage taken by [[15%]] and recovers [[3%]] of lost HP per second for [[8]]s. Triggers up to once every [[20]]s.
Lvl. 4 Refinement: In Rivalry Mode, increases 18 Crit Resist, 30 Crit DMG DEF.

d: Thador restores [[5%]] of his max HP every second as long as his lieutenant is alive.
